title: Mitigate plant pests, diseases and disorders in a permaculture system
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Mitigate plant pests, diseases and disorders in a permaculture system demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify possible pests, diseases and disorders for permaculture system

pcs.text: Identify pests, diseases and disorders common to plants grown in the permaculture system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify pests, diseases and disorders common to plants grown in the permaculture system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify pests, diseases and disorders common to plants grown in the permaculture system.
